nodes.label: Myanmar Local Brand Shirt E-Commerce PRD
Locked Technology Stack
nodes.rationale: Any deviation requires a formal change request and re-review. See AGENTS.md §Tech Stack for the operational rules.

nodes.label: Embedded Product Variants Pattern
nodes.rationale: Single query fetches product + all variants + all images (no joins - Convex has no SQL joins); atomic updates in one transaction; read-heavy workload; type-safe nesting via Convex validators.

nodes.label: shadcn Preset b2BVC6P2m (teal/emerald, neutral base, radius 0.45rem)
Database Schema Rules (Convex codegen + embedded variants)
nodes.rationale: Whenever Convex schema changes, regenerate codegen and run bunx convex dev. NEVER edit convex/_generated/*. NEVER split product variants into separate tables - use the embedded colorVariants array pattern (see §Schema in @PRD.md).

nodes.label: Branch/PR Workflow (feature/fix/hotfix, Conventional Commits, PR target)
Never-Do Rules (14 explicit prohibitions)
nodes.rationale: 14 explicit never-do rules: no direct component/ui edits, no npm/yarn/pnpm, no normalized variant tables, no hardcoded strings/symbols/hex/oklch/fonts, no any, no bypassed admin guard, no PII in Convex, no decorative animations, no undeclared deps, no merge without CodeRabbit, no Convex from client without typed hooks, no duplicated components.

nodes.label: Guest Cart Merge on Sign-In (khit:guest-cart localStorage)
Guest Wishlist Merge on Sign-In (khit:guest-wishlist localStorage)
Embedded Color Variants Pattern (rationale: keeps related data together; cart/wishlist/orders use string keys, not foreign keys; orders snapshot product data at purchase time)
Cash on Delivery (COD) — only payment method at launch
Convex Auth decision (rationale: replaces Better Auth per Phase 0 Option B; deviates from PRD §2 / AGENTS.md §Tech Stack which specify Better Auth — those docs must be updated)
Seed Admin User (zweaungnaing.info@gmail.com via SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD env)
Convex Schema (users, categories, products with embedded colorVariants[], cartItems, wishlistItems, orders with snapshot items, storeSettings)
Sentry Scaffolding (conditional on NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN; sentry.{client,server,edge}.config.ts + withSentryConfig)
Admin Role Guard Middleware (apps/admin/middleware.ts checks role === 'admin')
formatMMK() utility (no decimals, MMK currency formatter)
packages/lib workspace (cn, formatMMK, constants, i18n, sentry, cart helpers)
packages/config workspace (eslint, tailwind, typescript shared configs)
i18n module (t('key') wrapper + locales/en.json) — English at launch, Burmese-ready
Phase 1 Storefront MVP Plan (Status: Locked, June 2026)
Guest Cart via localStorage (rationale: auth deferred to Phase 2; khit:guest-cart v1 JSON; mergeGuest mutation on sign-in)
Gradient Placeholder Images (rationale: image uploads deferred to Phase 3 admin; Phase 1 uses colorHex-driven gradients, no storage setup)
Search Overlay (⌘K Command Palette, useQuery api.products.list with debounced search)
Pickup Store Settings (pickupStoreName/Address/Hours added to storeSettings schema)
formatMMK rounds to nearest 100 (rationale: MMK smallest unit is 100; no .00 decimals; formatMMK(2473) -> '2,500 Ks')
RTL Support via logical CSS properties (ms-*, me-*, ps-*, pe-*, start, end; directional icons get rtl:rotate-180)
React Hook Form + Zod (used by all forms: checkout, auth flows, profile)
Phase 1 i18n key batch (nav, header, footer, homepage, plp, pdp, cart, checkout, order, search, errors, brand namespaces)
PDP, PLP, Homepage, Cart page, Checkout, Order confirmation routes
Cart Drawer (Sheet side='right' with items, qty stepper, totals, Checkout CTA)
Phase 2 Auth and Accounts Plan (Status: Draft, June 2026)
Convex Auth Password provider (no-verification variant; flows: signUp, signIn, reset, reset-verification, email-verification)
Resend Email Provider (added in Phase 2 for verify + reset flows; RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_FROM_EMAIL env vars)
Wishlist System (concurrent localStorage + Convex wishlistItems; useWishlistMergeOnAuth mirrors cart merge)
Account Dashboard (/account layout with sidebar: Profile, Orders, Wishlist, Sign out)
Password Reset Flow (requestPasswordReset + confirmPasswordReset via Resend)
Email Verification (verify: Resend({ from }) on Password provider; /auth/verify route)
useAuth() composite hook (wraps useConvexAuth + useQuery(api.users.getMe) + signIn/signOut flow helpers)
CI Workflow (push/PR to main, develop; runs lint, build, format:check)
CI Job: bun install --frozen-lockfile + lint + build + format:check
Storefront service (port 3000, bun run --cwd apps/storefront dev)
Admin service (port 3001, bun run --cwd apps/admin dev)

hyperedges.label: Canonical Project Document Set (PRD + DESIGN + AGENTS + PROMPT + README)
Phase 0 Foundation workstreams (convex auth, sentry, seed admin, shadcn init, schema, admin guard, formatMMK, i18n, packages/{ui,convex,lib,config})
Phase 1 Storefront MVP workstreams (guest cart, search overlay, gradient placeholders, pickup settings, formatMMK rounding, RTL, RHF+Zod, i18n batch, PDP/PLP, cart drawer)
Phase 2 Auth and Accounts workstreams (password provider, Resend, wishlist, account dashboard, password reset, email verification, useAuth hook)
CI Pipeline steps (checkout, Bun setup, install frozen lockfile, lint, build, format check)
Docker Compose dev stack (storefront + admin services sharing Dockerfile.dev)
